title: Lesson 89: (Grammar) - too; also; in addition; as well; (not) either (in ...

intro_cards.title: Particle も: 'Also / Too / Even'
intro_cards.body:
も replaces は or が to mean 'also' or 'too.'

• 私も学生です。(I am also a student.)
• 猫もいます。(There's also a cat.)

With negatives, も = 'not either':
• 私も行きません。(I won't go either.)

も can stack:
• 猫も犬もいます。(There are both cats and dogs.)
• 猫も犬もいません。(There are neither cats nor dogs.)

も emphasizing quantity ('a whole / as many as'):
• 3時間も待った！(I waited a whole 3 hours!)
